3038590.name: BigFool
3038590.description:
An FPS Co-op game where you and your friends have a once in a lifetime opportunity: Hunt BigFool. BigFool is an elusive, fearsome creature of the night from unknown origins. Set in the Crimblr Forest, explore various points of interest, keep an eye and an ear out, and take down this iconic beast.

Trudge and venture through the Crimblr Forest with all its beauty and sights to see.

Be wary of other critters in the woods.
You’re not alone with BigFool...

Play as an elite hunter known only as “Blurgh”, equipped with his trusty shotgun.


Make sure to find and use supplies when needed.

Search for an advanced weapon that can give you an edge in the hunt.

Experience the passage of time with an intuitive day night cycle.

Once the sun sets you must be extra careful...

Key Features:
  • Play alone or with friends(4 players max)
  • Communicate with your friends using Proximity Voice Chat or the Text Chat
  • Hunt BigFool and other critters
  • Explore 8 unique points of interest across the Crimblr Forest
  • Uncover secrets
  • Use your trusty shotgun or find another, more secret, weapon
  • Restore your health and replenish your ammo at varied supply locations to stay strong during the hunt
  • Revive your fellow Blurghs if they’re incapacitated
  • Make sure to use your flashlight, it gets really dark
  • Express yourself using Blurgh’s Facial Expression Menu
  • Make use of Blurgh’s incredible cardio and sprint to explore faster
  • Be mindful of the sounds you hear… BigFool is quite loud
  • If you happen to lose your life during the hunt, you can Spectate your friends and cheer them on
  • If you want to successfully take down BigFool, teamwork is vital, so don't split up
3038590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
